What is Circle?

Circle is the AI-powered home for your community.

From a branded website to discussions, courses, events, payments, email marketing, AI agents, and more, Circle gives you everything you need to build and scale your community-led business.

AI & Automation
From AI-powered agents to automated workflows, Circle helps you customize experiences, prompt interactions, and grow your community — all with less manual effort.

AI agents are always-on extensions of you — built to guide, coach, and engage your members.

Build personalized AI agents to support, onboard, and coach your community

Train them with your posts, comments, courses, and resources

Manage it all from one shared AI inbox, stepping in only when needed
